_comment: neuraltest.config.json — checked into your repo alongside your app code.
_comment2: The ci_runner reads this when no CLI flags are passed. CLI flags override these values.

tagging_convention._doc: Apply these tags to test cases in the NeuralTest UI to control which tests run where.
tagging_convention.smoke: Fast sanity checks — run on every PR (< 2 min total)
tagging_convention.critical: Core user journeys — always run, never skip
tagging_convention.slow: Tests that take > 30s — excluded from PR runs
